meaning: adj.骞崇瓑涓讳箟鐨刵.骞崇瓑涓讳箟
examples: I still believe in the notion of an egalitarian society.
Jacksonian America was not a fluid, egalitarian society where individual wealth and poverty were ephemeral conditions.
Even the more tormented parts of the world are beginning to experience the egalitarian beauty of public wilderness.
One is an august teaching hospital, nonprofit, run by worthy types and very egalitarian.
